warbox_enable_factories Description: Toggle the production of military units in cities
warbox_army_per_pop Description: Number of population required to spawn a military unit
warbox_force_capture Description: Decides if the kingdom capturing a city keeps it or the main kingdom does
culture_trait_craft_firearms_info: Allows for the production of guns
culture_trait_craft_firearms_info_2: Why gift gifts when you can gift bullets?
culture_trait_vehicle_factories_info: Allows for the building of vehicle factories
culture_trait_vehicle_factories_info_2: Machine beats man, and factories beat farms
trait_warbox_unit_info_2: Let's see that cracker try and stop a tank!
trait_atgm_launcher_info_2: ITS A MISSILE NOT A SPEAR
smg_description: A fast firing sub-machine gun, not very accurate
shotgunreplace_description: A shotgun firing many pellets, dangerous up close
autorifle_description: A repeating rifle, hits fast and hard
sniperrifle_description: A very accurate bolt-action rifle, hits VERY hard
rpg_description: A launcher firing rocket propelled grenades
artillery_bunker_description: Spawn a bunker fortification with an artillery cannon
heavy_factory_description: Spawn a factory that produces heavy vehicles
light_factory_description: Spawn a factory that produces light vehicles
light_aircraft_factory_description: Spawn a factory that produces light aircraft
heavy_aircraft_factory_description: Spawn a factory that produces heavy aircraft
shipyard_description: Spawn a shipyard that produces naval vessels
spawn_tank_description: Spawn a heavily armored tank vehicle
spawn_apc_description: Spawn a lightly armored personnel carrier
spawn_bomber_description: Spawn a high flying bomber that drops devastating bombs
spawn_fighter_description: Spawn a high flying fighter jet
cant_spawn_unit_kingdom: You must spawn this unit within a kingdom.
